issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for the provided examples.
The skill assumes a Node.js/React environment, limiting its applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: define-products-cube
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most required elements (cube name, sql_table, measures, dimensions, pre‑aggregation, segment) with a few inaccuracies, while Response B fails to meet several key specifications (sql_table, dimension names, pre‑aggregation dimensions, join, and segment naming).

scenarios.name: build-active-users-bar-chart
scenarios.rationale: Response A uses useCubeQuery and Recharts correctly but omits the required timeDimension, while Response B uses CubeProvider/CubeChart and wrong measures, missing all rubric requirements.
